prompt:
FIRE SHOES

Create a hyper-realistic cinematic sneaker transformation scene inspired by premium brand name commercials. IMPORTANT: Generate ONLY ONE SINGLE VERTICAL IMAGE. STYLE: Ultra-realistic sportswear advertisement. Luxury footwear campaign. MAIN CONCEPT: A pair of premium white shose name sneakers worn on both feet, standing on black volcanic ground. Both shoes visible from the front. glows through cracks across both sneakers. A giant floating made entirely of fire and molten particles forms between the two shoes. Burning embers explode around the shoes. The volcanic ground beneath the sneakers is cracking from extreme heat. LIGHTING: Orange lava glow. Cinematic fire reflections. MOOD: Inferno. Power. Destruction. QUALITY: Ultra realistic native 4K HDR realism. Vertical 9:16.
